name: Old Fashioned Oatmeal Cookies
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Quick Cooking Oats (not instant or old fashioned)
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 20 Minutes Bake Time: 10 to 12 Minutes
1. Preheat oven to 375°F. Grease baking sheets with Butter Flavor Crisco. Set aside.
2. In a large bowl, cream the Butter Flavor Crisco, brown sugar, egg, milk, and vanilla extract until well blended.
3. Gradually mix in oats, flour, cinnamon, baking soda, and salt into the creamed mixture. Stir in raisins and nuts.
4. Drop rounded tablespoonfuls of dough onto the prepared baking sheets, spacing them about 2 inches apart.
5. Bake at 375°F for 10 to 12 minutes. Allow cookies to cool on the baking sheet for 2 minutes before transferring to a cooling rack.
Makes 2 1/2 dozen 2 1/2 inch cookies.
